title: Export column from Excel in Monday column

posts.author: _Esther (EstherH)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI all,
I saw a discussion from 2021 on importing one column from Excel into a existing column in a Monday board (like names or email addresses) and based on what I read and saw it is still not possible.

Can someone confirm? Is there a workaround so that I do not have to manually copy/paste 200 items from one excel column to a monday column?

Thanks heaps,
Esther

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @_Esther,

You can use the Toolkit app for that and more.
If you have any questions about the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: _Esther (EstherH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @kolaai ! That looks promising.

Would love to see a native option though that doesn´t require extra payment.
